created.description: The timestamp of the event's creation.

updated.description: The timestamp of the event's last update.

action.description: The performed action. Can be: CREATE or UPDATE.

user_id.description: The id of the user the event applied to (if it was a user event).

monetary_account_id.description: The id of the monetary account the event applied to (if it was a monetary account event).

object.description: The details of the external object the event was created for.

status.description: The event status. Can be: FINALIZED or AWAITING_REPLY. An example of FINALIZED event is a payment received event, while an AWAITING_REPLY event is a request received event.
